generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former NATO cyber defense strategist, I've seen firsthand how critical strategic autonomy is for our security. While some worry about civil liberties, the reality is that without robust domestic capabilities, we're vulnerable. Our allies expect us to carry our weight - and that means investing in our own defenses. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
